title: GitHub - Kalcode/spaceprojectsim
excerpt: Contribute to Kalcode/spaceprojectsim development by creating an account on GitHub.
content_html:
🚀 The Space Project

A self-running space-economy simulator, in Rust + Bevy.

Hundreds of autonomous ships trade, mine, haul cargo, take out contracts, run out of fuel, and occasionally go bankrupt across a living solar economy — markets find their own prices, factions tax and subsidize, populations migrate when they're unhappy, and abandoned stations rot. It all runs in one native binary with no runtime dependencies.

What is this?

The Space Project is an agent-driven economic simulation wrapped in a native 3D client. There's no scripted storyline and no player objective — you're an observer (and god-mode admin) watching an economy run itself.

Every ship is an autonomous agent with its own credits, crew, fuel, cargo hold, and a GOAP planner that decides what to do next: chase the highest-margin trade route, accept a delivery contract, seek out a shipyard to retrofit, or dock and let its crew rest before morale collapses. Facilities run production recipes, degrade and self-repair, level up, and get abandoned when they go broke. Factions collect taxes and post subsidies. Populations consume food, produce labor, and pack up and leave when sentiment craters. Markets price everything off a coverage model with shortage urgency multipliers — no fixed prices anywhere.

It started as an Elixir/Phoenix prototype and was rewritten in Rust because the BEAM scheduler struggled on Windows gaming PCs. The engine (sim_core) is pure, synchronous, IO-free Rust; the Bevy client embeds it directly as a library, so the simulation and the renderer share the same ECS world with zero marshalling between them.

Scale today: ~485 live agents (282 ships · 93 facilities · 27 populations · 8 factions · 60 celestial bodies), ticking at p50 ≈ 10–20 ms inside a 125 ms budget. The architecture is built to push toward 100k+.

🌌 A note on where this is going

Nowhere, on its own — and that's kind of the point.

This started as a fun idea: a from-scratch space economy that actually simulates itself instead of faking it. It grew way past what I expected, mostly in late-night sessions pairing with Claude. But I'm not pretending it's a game with a roadmap, and I'm not actively pushing it toward "shippable."

I'm putting it out under MIT because the bones are genuinely good and I'd rather someone do something with it than let it sit in a private repo. So: fork it, gut it, rename it, bolt a game on top of it, rip the economy engine out and use it somewhere else entirely. Build the thing I didn't.

PRs and issues are welcome and I'll look at them, but I can't promise a cadence. If you want to take it somewhere real, see CONTRIBUTING.md — there's a "directions you could take this" section written exactly for you.

Screenshots

What it simulates

System What happens
Ship AI (GOAP) A forward planner scores every goal — trade, deliver, refuel, retrofit, rest, explore — over an abstract world state, then builds a behavior tree to execute the cheapest plan. Ships replan mid-flight when a better option appears.
Economy An order-book market per station prices 13 commodities off a coverage model with shortage-urgency multipliers. Ships move real supply between markets as they trade.
Contracts Six kinds — Delivery, Courier, Passenger, Subsidy, Supply, CrewMission — with a full posted → accepted → paid lifecycle, reputation gating, auto-renewal, and age-escalating payments.
Facilities Run production recipes (smelting, refining, manufacturing, farming, mining), degrade over time, self-repair with tools, level up 1–10, restock from local markets, and get abandoned when chronically broke.
Factions Collect taxes on member facilities, post subsidy contracts for chronic shortages, fund construction of new facilities where demand is unmet, and hold pairwise relations.
Populations Consume food and fuel, produce labor, post food and passenger contracts under stress, and physically migrate to happier systems when sentiment collapses.
Crew Aggregate hunger / fatigue / morale with derived tasks (piloting, engineering, trading, eating, resting), skill progression, wages, and a morale death-spiral guard.
Construction Chronic shortages spawn construction sites that accrete delivered cargo 0 → 1.0, then materialize into a real, persistent facility.
Persistence Everything flushes to SQLite; a sim resumes from the exact tick it left off. A per-universe world_seed keeps the nebula backdrop and landmarks stable across restarts.
Spatial LOD Distant ships tick less often (with rate-scaled state changes) so the frame budget goes where you're looking.

For the deep dive — tick phase ordering, the AI stack, the economic feedback loop, runtime ownership — see docs/ARCHITECTURE.md, which has mermaid diagrams for all of it.

Quick start

You need a Rust toolchain (stable). Then:

make run
# equivalent to: cargo run -p client_bevy

That boots the Bevy app into the main menu. Start opens a fresh universe (name it, or take the default); Load Game lists every save in the binary's directory. Saves live next to the binary as <universe-name>.db — default sim.db.

Other entry points:

Goal Command
Windowed client (debug) make run
Release build make build → binary at target/release/client_bevy
Headless (no window, for CI / smoke tests) cargo run -p client_bevy -- --headless
Verify (build + test + clippy, strict) make verify
Smoke test (boot headless, print DB counts) scripts/smoke.sh [secs]

One binary, one process. client_bevy is the whole thing — the simulation runs in-process. Headless mode spins up the HTTP/WebSocket server (from the sim_server library crate) for scripted and CI use; there is no separate server binary to run.

Controls

Input Action
Left-drag Orbit camera
Right-drag / WASD Pan
Scroll Zoom
Left-click Select ship or facility → opens its details panel
Right-click Context menu (Inspect / Follow / POV / Destroy)
Space Pause / resume
Esc Close top panel · clear selection · open pause menu
P Pause menu
F12 Screenshot
Top bar Toggle panels (Ships, Markets, Factions, Contracts, Events, …), set speed (1× / 2× / 5× / 10×), spawn ships/facilities

Every panel reads the ECS world live — the inspector is effectively a real-time debugger with full component access. Click a ship to see its credits, crew, fuel, current goal, fitting, route memory, and its last few AI commands.

Architecture

Five crates in one Cargo workspace:

sim_core     Pure simulation logic — hecs ECS, GOAP planner, economy,
             contracts. No async, no IO, no framework. Trivially testable.
sim_db       SQLite persistence (sqlx) — pool, seeder, ECS loader,
             persistence worker, migrations.
sim_server   Library crate — HTTP/WebSocket handlers + engine apply
             helpers. Drives headless mode; embedded by the client.
sim_protocol WebSocket wire types (headless / CI only).
client_bevy  The binary. Bevy 0.18 + egui. Embeds sim_core as a Bevy
             Resource; the renderer queries the hecs world directly.

Three rules keep it honest:

  1. sim_core never imports tokio, sqlx, or axum. Pure logic only, so the whole simulation is reasoned about and unit-tested without async.
  2. hecs is the source of truth during a tick. The tick loop holds exclusive mutable access — no per-agent locks.
  3. Cross-entity effects go through a command buffer (SimCommand). A phase reads world state and writes commands; the next phase applies them. Deterministic, no mid-phase write conflicts.

The full tick phase order, ownership model, and feedback loops are diagrammed in docs/ARCHITECTURE.md.

The original Godot client lives on in history as a parity reference, but it's no longer the front end — the pivot to an embedded Bevy client removed the socket boundary entirely, and every feature now lands in client_bevy.

Building & packaging

The Makefile wraps cargo + rustup + codesign + packaging:

make build              # release binary (host target)
make build-mac          # arm64 macOS  (also: build-mac-intel, build-mac-universal)
make build-win          # Windows MSVC (run on a Windows host)
make build-linux        # Linux        (best on a Linux host)

make package-mac        # .app bundle + ad-hoc codesign + Info.plist
make dmg                # macOS .dmg
make package-win        # Windows .zip
make package-linux      # Linux .tar.gz

The workspace version in the root Cargo.toml is the single source of truth — the binary reads it via env!("CARGO_PKG_VERSION") and the Makefile greps the same field for Info.plist and archive names, so packaged builds never drift.

Tech stack

  • Rust (edition 2021) — the whole thing
  • Bevy 0.18 — renderer, ECS-driven main loop, custom WGSL shaders (procedural planets, sun corona, nebulae, starfield)
  • hecs — the simulation's own ECS (separate from Bevy's, deliberately)
  • egui (via bevy_egui) — every inspector panel
  • bevy_hanabi — GPU particle trails and explosions
  • sqlx + SQLite — persistence, bundled so there's no runtime dependency
  • axum + tokio — the headless HTTP/WebSocket harness

Contributing

Contributions are welcome — see CONTRIBUTING.md for dev setup, the conventions that keep the codebase clean, and a list of concrete directions if you want to take this somewhere real.

The fastest sanity check before any PR:

make verify   # build + ~250 tests + clippy, strict

License

MIT © 2026 Kalcode (David Clausen). Do whatever you like with it.

Built for fun in Rust & Bevy · By Kalcode & Claude · Made with ❤️ in Illinois

sentences.en: 🚀 The Space Project
sentences.zh: 🚀 太空计划

blocks.html_en: A self-running space-economy simulator, in Rust + Bevy.

sentences.en: A self-running space-economy simulator, in Rust + Bevy.
sentences.zh: Rust + Bevy 中的自运行太空经济模拟器。

blocks.html_en: Hundreds of autonomous ships trade, mine, haul cargo, take out contracts, run out of fuel, and occasionally go bankrupt across a living solar economy — markets find their own prices, factions tax and subsidize, populations migrate when they're unhappy, and abandoned stations rot. It all runs in one native binary with no runtime dependencies.

sentences.en: Hundreds of autonomous ships trade, mine, haul cargo, take out contracts, run out of fuel, and occasionally go bankrupt across a living solar economy — markets find their own prices, factions tax and subsidize, populations migrate when they're unhappy, and abandoned stations rot.
sentences.zh: 数百艘自主船舶进行贸易、采矿、运输货物、签订合同、耗尽燃料，甚至在生机勃勃的太阳能经济中偶尔破产——市场自行定价，派系征税和补贴，人口不满时迁移，废弃的车站腐烂。

sentences.en: It all runs in one native binary with no runtime dependencies.
sentences.zh: 一切都在一个本机二进制文件中运行，没有运行时依赖性。

sentences.en: What is this?
sentences.zh: 这是什么？

blocks.html_en: The Space Project is an agent-driven economic simulation wrapped in a native 3D client. There's no scripted storyline and no player objective — you're an observer (and god-mode admin) watching an economy run itself.

sentences.en: The Space Project is an agent-driven economic simulation wrapped in a native 3D client.
sentences.zh: Space Project 是一个包含在本机 3D 客户端中的代理驱动的经济模拟。

sentences.en: There's no scripted storyline and no player objective — you're an observer (and god-mode admin) watching an economy run itself.
sentences.zh: 没有脚本化的故事情节，也没有玩家目标——你是一个观察者（和上帝模式的管理员），看着经济运行。

blocks.html_en: Every ship is an autonomous agent with its own credits, crew, fuel, cargo hold, and a GOAP planner that decides what to do next: chase the highest-margin trade route, accept a delivery contract, seek out a shipyard to retrofit, or dock and let its crew rest before morale collapses. Facilities run production recipes, degrade and self-repair, level up, and get abandoned when they go broke. Factions collect taxes and post subsidies. Populations consume food, produce labor, and pack up and leave when sentiment craters. Markets price everything off a coverage model with shortage urgency multipliers — no fixed prices anywhere.

sentences.en: Every ship is an autonomous agent with its own credits, crew, fuel, cargo hold, and a GOAP planner that decides what to do next: chase the highest-margin trade route, accept a delivery contract, seek out a shipyard to retrofit, or dock and let its crew rest before morale collapses.
sentences.zh: 每艘船都是一个自主代理人，拥有自己的信用、船员、燃料、货舱，以及一个 GOAP 规划者，该规划者决定下一步做什么：追逐利润率最高的贸易路线，接受交付合同，寻找造船厂进行改造，或者在士气崩溃之前停靠并让船员休息。

sentences.en: Facilities run production recipes, degrade and self-repair, level up, and get abandoned when they go broke.
sentences.zh: 设施运行生产配方，退化和自我修复，升级，并在破产时被遗弃。

sentences.en: Factions collect taxes and post subsidies.
sentences.zh: 派系征收税收和邮政补贴。

sentences.en: Populations consume food, produce labor, and pack up and leave when sentiment craters.
sentences.zh: 人们消费食物、生产劳动力，并在情绪低落时收拾行李离开。

sentences.en: Markets price everything off a coverage model with shortage urgency multipliers — no fixed prices anywhere.
sentences.zh: 市场根据短缺紧急程度乘数对所有产品进行定价——任何地方都没有固定价格。

blocks.html_en: It started as an Elixir/Phoenix prototype and was rewritten in Rust because the BEAM scheduler struggled on Windows gaming PCs. The engine (sim_core) is pure, synchronous, IO-free Rust; the Bevy client embeds it directly as a library, so the simulation and the renderer share the same ECS world with zero marshalling between them.

sentences.en: It started as an Elixir/Phoenix prototype and was rewritten in Rust because the BEAM scheduler struggled on Windows gaming PCs.
sentences.zh: 它最初是 Elixir/Phoenix 原型，后来用 Rust 重写，因为 BEAM 调度程序在 Windows 游戏 PC 上表现不佳。

sentences.en: The engine (sim_core) is pure, synchronous, IO-free Rust; the Bevy client embeds it directly as a library, so the simulation and the renderer share the same ECS world with zero marshalling between them.
sentences.zh: 引擎 (sim_core) 是纯粹的、同步的、无 IO 的 Rust； Bevy 客户端将其直接作为库嵌入，因此模拟和渲染器共享相同的 ECS 世界，它们之间的编组为零。

blocks.html_en: Scale today: ~485 live agents (282 ships · 93 facilities · 27 populations · 8 factions · 60 celestial bodies), ticking at p50 ≈ 10–20 ms inside a 125 ms budget. The architecture is built to push toward 100k+.

sentences.en: Scale today: ~485 live agents (282 ships · 93 facilities · 27 populations · 8 factions · 60 celestial bodies), ticking at p50 ≈ 10–20 ms inside a 125 ms budget.
sentences.zh: 如今的规模：约 485 个活体代理（282 艘飞船·93 个设施·27 个人口·8 个派系·60 个天体），在 125 毫秒的预算内以 p50 ≈ 10–20 毫秒的速度滴答。

sentences.en: The architecture is built to push toward 100k+.
sentences.zh: 该架构旨在推动 100k+ 的发展。

blocks.html_en: 🌌 A note on where this is going

sentences.en: 🌌 A note on where this is going
sentences.zh: 🌌 关于事情进展的注释

blocks.html_en:
Nowhere, on its own — and that's kind of the point.

This started as a fun idea: a from-scratch space economy that actually simulates itself instead of faking it. It grew way past what I expected, mostly in late-night sessions pairing with Claude. But I'm not pretending it's a game with a roadmap, and I'm not actively pushing it toward "shippable."

I'm putting it out under MIT because the bones are genuinely good and I'd rather someone do something with it than let it sit in a private repo. So: fork it, gut it, rename it, bolt a game on top of it, rip the economy engine out and use it somewhere else entirely. Build the thing I didn't.

PRs and issues are welcome and I'll look at them, but I can't promise a cadence. If you want to take it somewhere real, see CONTRIBUTING.md — there's a "directions you could take this" section written exactly for you.

sentences.en: Nowhere, on its own — and that's kind of the point.
sentences.zh: 没有任何地方，独自存在——这就是重点。

sentences.en: This started as a fun idea: a from-scratch space economy that actually simulates itself instead of faking it.
sentences.zh: 这最初是一个有趣的想法：从头开始的太空经济，实际上是模拟自己，而不是伪造它。

sentences.en: It grew way past what I expected, mostly in late-night sessions pairing with Claude.
sentences.zh: 它的发展远远超出了我的预期，主要是在与克劳德配对的深夜会议中。

sentences.en: But I'm not pretending it's a game with a roadmap, and I'm not actively pushing it toward "shippable."
sentences.zh: 但我并没有假装这是一款有路线图的游戏，也没有积极推动它走向“可交付”。

sentences.en: I'm putting it out under MIT because the bones are genuinely good and I'd rather someone do something with it than let it sit in a private repo.
sentences.zh: 我将它放在麻省理工学院下，因为这些骨头确实很好，我宁愿有人用它做点什么，而不是让它放在私人仓库中。

sentences.en: So: fork it, gut it, rename it, bolt a game on top of it, rip the economy engine out and use it somewhere else entirely.
sentences.zh: 所以：分叉它，删除它，重命名它，在它上面安装一个游戏，撕掉经济引擎并完全在其他地方使用它。

sentences.en: Build the thing I didn't.
sentences.zh: 构建我没有构建的东西。

sentences.en: PRs and issues are welcome and I'll look at them, but I can't promise a cadence.
sentences.zh: 欢迎提出 PR 和问题，我会查看它们，但我不能保证节奏。

sentences.en: If you want to take it somewhere real, see CONTRIBUTING.md — there's a "directions you could take this" section written exactly for you.
sentences.zh: 如果你想把它带到真实的地方，请参阅 CONTRIBUTING.md — 有一个“你可以采取这个的方向”部分是专门为你编写的。

sentences.zh: 但我并没有假装这是一款有路线图的游戏，也没有积极推动它走向“可交付”。

blocks.html_en: I'm putting it out under MIT because the bones are genuinely good and I'd rather someone do something with it than let it sit in a private repo. So: fork it, gut it, rename it, bolt a game on top of it, rip the economy engine out and use it somewhere else entirely. Build the thing I didn't.

sentences.en: I'm putting it out under MIT because the bones are genuinely good and I'd rather someone do something with it than let it sit in a private repo.
sentences.zh: 我将它放在麻省理工学院下，因为这些骨头确实很好，我宁愿有人用它做点什么，而不是让它放在私人仓库中。

sentences.en: So: fork it, gut it, rename it, bolt a game on top of it, rip the economy engine out and use it somewhere else entirely.
sentences.zh: 所以：分叉它，删除它，重命名它，在它上面安装一个游戏，撕掉经济引擎并完全在其他地方使用它。

sentences.en: Build the thing I didn't.
sentences.zh: 构建我没有构建的东西。

blocks.html_en: PRs and issues are welcome and I'll look at them, but I can't promise a cadence. If you want to take it somewhere real, see CONTRIBUTING.md — there's a "directions you could take this" section written exactly for you.

sentences.en: PRs and issues are welcome and I'll look at them, but I can't promise a cadence.
sentences.zh: 欢迎提出 PR 和问题，我会查看它们，但我不能保证节奏。

sentences.en: If you want to take it somewhere real, see CONTRIBUTING.md — there's a "directions you could take this" section written exactly for you.
sentences.zh: 如果你想把它带到真实的地方，请参阅 CONTRIBUTING.md — 有一个“你可以采取这个的方向”部分是专门为你编写的。

sentences.en: Screenshots
sentences.zh: 截图

sentences.en: What it simulates
sentences.zh: 它模拟什么

sentences.en: System
sentences.zh: 系统

sentences.en: What happens
sentences.zh: 会发生什么

sentences.en: Ship AI (GOAP)
sentences.zh: 船舶人工智能 (GOAP)

blocks.html_en: A forward planner scores every goal — trade, deliver, refuel, retrofit, rest, explore — over an abstract world state, then builds a behavior tree to execute the cheapest plan. Ships replan mid-flight when a better option appears.

sentences.en: A forward planner scores every goal — trade, deliver, refuel, retrofit, rest, explore — over an abstract world state, then builds a behavior tree to execute the cheapest plan.
sentences.zh: 前瞻性规划者通过抽象的世界状态对每个目标（贸易、交付、加油、改造、休息、探索）进行评分，然后构建行为树来执行最便宜的计划。

sentences.en: Ships replan mid-flight when a better option appears.
sentences.zh: 当出现更好的选择时，船舶会在飞行途中重新计划。

sentences.en: Economy
sentences.zh: 经济

blocks.html_en: An order-book market per station prices 13 commodities off a coverage model with shortage-urgency multipliers. Ships move real supply between markets as they trade.

sentences.en: An order-book market per station prices 13 commodities off a coverage model with shortage-urgency multipliers.
sentences.zh: 每个电台的订单簿市场根据短缺紧急乘数对 13 种商品进行定价。

sentences.en: Ships move real supply between markets as they trade.
sentences.zh: 船舶在交易时在市场之间移动实际供应。

sentences.en: Contracts
sentences.zh: 合约

blocks.html_en: Six kinds — Delivery, Courier, Passenger, Subsidy, Supply, CrewMission — with a full posted → accepted → paid lifecycle, reputation gating, auto-renewal, and age-escalating payments.

sentences.en: Six kinds — Delivery, Courier, Passenger, Subsidy, Supply, CrewMission — with a full posted → accepted → paid lifecycle, reputation gating, auto-renewal, and age-escalating payments.
sentences.zh: 六种——交付、快递、乘客、补贴、供应、机组任务——具有完整的发布→接受→付费生命周期、声誉门控、自动续订和年龄递增付款。

sentences.en: Facilities
sentences.zh: 设施

blocks.html_en: Run production recipes (smelting, refining, manufacturing, farming, mining), degrade over time, self-repair with tools, level up 1–10, restock from local markets, and get abandoned when chronically broke.

sentences.en: Run production recipes (smelting, refining, manufacturing, farming, mining), degrade over time, self-repair with tools, level up 1–10, restock from local markets, and get abandoned when chronically broke.
sentences.zh: 运行生产配方（冶炼、精炼、制造、农业、采矿），随着时间的推移而退化，使用工具自我修复，升级 1-10，从当地市场补货，并在长期损坏时被抛弃。

sentences.en: Factions
sentences.zh: 派系

blocks.html_en: Collect taxes on member facilities, post subsidy contracts for chronic shortages, fund construction of new facilities where demand is unmet, and hold pairwise relations.

sentences.en: Collect taxes on member facilities, post subsidy contracts for chronic shortages, fund construction of new facilities where demand is unmet, and hold pairwise relations.
sentences.zh: 对会员设施征税，为长期短缺提供补贴合同，为未满足需求的新设施建设提供资金，并保持配对关系。

sentences.en: Populations
sentences.zh: 人口

blocks.html_en: Consume food and fuel, produce labor, post food and passenger contracts under stress, and physically migrate to happier systems when sentiment collapses.

sentences.en: Consume food and fuel, produce labor, post food and passenger contracts under stress, and physically migrate to happier systems when sentiment collapses.
sentences.zh: 消耗食物和燃料，生产劳动力，在压力下签订食物和乘客合同，并在情绪崩溃时迁移到更快乐的系统。

blocks.html_en: Aggregate hunger / fatigue / morale with derived tasks (piloting, engineering, trading, eating, resting), skill progression, wages, and a morale death-spiral guard.

sentences.en: Aggregate hunger / fatigue / morale with derived tasks (piloting, engineering, trading, eating, resting), skill progression, wages, and a morale death-spiral guard.
sentences.zh: 饥饿/疲劳/士气与衍生任务（驾驶、工程、贸易、饮食、休息）、技能进步、工资和士气死亡螺旋守卫的总和。

sentences.en: Construction
sentences.zh: 建造

blocks.html_en: Chronic shortages spawn construction sites that accrete delivered cargo 0 → 1.0, then materialize into a real, persistent facility.

sentences.en: Chronic shortages spawn construction sites that accrete delivered cargo 0 → 1.0, then materialize into a real, persistent facility.
sentences.zh: 长期的短缺催生了建筑工地，这些建筑工地将交付的货物从 0 → 1.0 累积起来，然后具体化为一个真正的、持久的设施。

sentences.en: Persistence
sentences.zh: 坚持

blocks.html_en: Everything flushes to SQLite; a sim resumes from the exact tick it left off. A per-universe world_seed keeps the nebula backdrop and landmarks stable across restarts.

sentences.en: Everything flushes to SQLite; a sim resumes from the exact tick it left off.
sentences.zh: 一切都会刷新到 SQLite； SIM 卡会从它停止的那一刻开始恢复。

sentences.en: A per-universe world_seed keeps the nebula backdrop and landmarks stable across restarts.
sentences.zh: 每个宇宙的 world_seed 使星云背景和地标在重新启动时保持稳定。

sentences.en: Spatial LOD
sentences.zh: 空间细节层次

blocks.html_en: Distant ships tick less often (with rate-scaled state changes) so the frame budget goes where you're looking.

sentences.en: Distant ships tick less often (with rate-scaled state changes) so the frame budget goes where you're looking.
sentences.zh: 远方船只的滴答次数较少（随着速率缩放的状态变化），因此框架预算会到达您想要的地方。

blocks.html_en: For the deep dive — tick phase ordering, the AI stack, the economic feedback loop, runtime ownership — see docs/ARCHITECTURE.md, which has mermaid diagrams for all of it.

sentences.en: For the deep dive — tick phase ordering, the AI stack, the economic feedback loop, runtime ownership — see docs/ARCHITECTURE.md, which has mermaid diagrams for all of it.
sentences.zh: 对于深入探讨 - 刻度阶段排序、AI 堆栈、经济反馈循环、运行时所有权 - 请参阅 docs/ARCHITECTURE.md，其中包含所有内容的美人鱼图。

sentences.en: Quick start
sentences.zh: 快速启动

blocks.html_en: You need a Rust toolchain (stable). Then:

sentences.en: You need a Rust toolchain (stable).
sentences.zh: 您需要一个 Rust 工具链（稳定）。

sentences.en: Then:
sentences.zh: 然后：

blocks.html_en: That boots the Bevy app into the main menu. Start opens a fresh universe (name it, or take the default); Load Game lists every save in the binary's directory. Saves live next to the binary as <universe-name>.db — default sim.db.

sentences.en: That boots the Bevy app into the main menu.
sentences.zh: 这会将 Bevy 应用程序启动到主菜单。

sentences.en: Start opens a fresh universe (name it, or take the default); Load Game lists every save in the binary's directory.
sentences.zh: 开始打开一个新的宇宙（命名它，或采用默认值）；加载游戏列出了二进制文件目录中的每个保存。

sentences.en: Saves live next to the binary as <universe-name>.db — default sim.db.
sentences.zh: 将二进制文件旁边的实时保存为 <universe-name>.db — 默认为 sim.db。

sentences.en: Other entry points:
sentences.zh: 其他切入点：

sentences.en: Command
sentences.zh: 命令

sentences.en: Windowed client (debug)
sentences.zh: 窗口客户端（调试）

sentences.en: make run
sentences.zh: 让跑

sentences.en: Release build
sentences.zh: 发布版本

sentences.en: make build → binary at target/release/client_bevy
sentences.zh: 在 target/release/client_bevy 进行构建 → 二进制文件

sentences.en: Headless (no window, for CI / smoke tests)
sentences.zh: 无头（无窗口，用于 CI/烟雾测试）

sentences.en: cargo run -p client_bevy -- --headless
sentences.zh: 货物运行-p client_bevy -- --headless

sentences.en: Verify (build + test + clippy, strict)
sentences.zh: 验证（构建+测试+clippy，严格）

sentences.en: make verify
sentences.zh: 进行验证

sentences.en: Smoke test (boot headless, print DB counts)
sentences.zh: 烟雾测试（无头启动，打印 DB 计数）

sentences.en: scripts/smoke.sh [secs]
sentences.zh: 脚本/smoke.sh [秒]

blocks.html_en: One binary, one process. client_bevy is the whole thing — the simulation runs in-process. Headless mode spins up the HTTP/WebSocket server (from the sim_server library crate) for scripted and CI use; there is no separate server binary to run.

sentences.en: One binary, one process.
sentences.zh: 一个二进制文件，一个进程。

sentences.en: client_bevy is the whole thing — the simulation runs in-process.
sentences.zh: client_bevy 是整个事情——模拟在进程中运行。

sentences.en: Headless mode spins up the HTTP/WebSocket server (from the sim_server library crate) for scripted and CI use; there is no separate server binary to run.
sentences.zh: 无头模式启动 HTTP/WebSocket 服务器（来自 sim_server 库箱）以供脚本和 CI 使用；没有单独的服务器二进制文件可以运行。

blocks.html_en: One binary, one process. client_bevy is the whole thing — the simulation runs in-process. Headless mode spins up the HTTP/WebSocket server (from the sim_server library crate) for scripted and CI use; there is no separate server binary to run.

sentences.en: One binary, one process.
sentences.zh: 一个二进制文件，一个进程。

sentences.en: client_bevy is the whole thing — the simulation runs in-process.
sentences.zh: client_bevy 是整个事情——模拟在进程中运行。

sentences.en: Headless mode spins up the HTTP/WebSocket server (from the sim_server library crate) for scripted and CI use; there is no separate server binary to run.
sentences.zh: 无头模式启动 HTTP/WebSocket 服务器（来自 sim_server 库箱）以供脚本和 CI 使用；没有单独的服务器二进制文件可以运行。

sentences.en: Controls
sentences.zh: 控制

sentences.en: Action
sentences.zh: 行动

sentences.en: Left-drag
sentences.zh: 左键拖动

sentences.en: Orbit camera
sentences.zh: 轨道相机

sentences.en: Right-drag / WASD
sentences.zh: 右键拖动/WASD

sentences.en: Scroll
sentences.zh: 滚动

sentences.en: Left-click
sentences.zh: 左键单击

blocks.html_en: Select ship or facility → opens its details panel

sentences.en: Select ship or facility → opens its details panel
sentences.zh: 选择船舶或设施 → 打开其详细信息面板

sentences.en: Right-click
sentences.zh: 右键单击

sentences.en: Context menu (Inspect / Follow / POV / Destroy)
sentences.zh: 上下文菜单（检查/跟随/POV/销毁）

sentences.en: Pause / resume
sentences.zh: 暂停/恢复

blocks.html_en: Close top panel · clear selection · open pause menu

sentences.en: Close top panel · clear selection · open pause menu
sentences.zh: 关闭顶部面板·清除选择·打开暂停菜单

sentences.en: Pause menu
sentences.zh: 暂停菜单

sentences.en: Screenshot
sentences.zh: 截屏

sentences.en: Top bar
sentences.zh: 顶栏

blocks.html_en: Toggle panels (Ships, Markets, Factions, Contracts, Events, …), set speed (1× / 2× / 5× / 10×), spawn ships/facilities

sentences.en: Toggle panels (Ships, Markets, Factions, Contracts, Events, …), set speed (1× / 2× / 5× / 10×), spawn ships/facilities
sentences.zh: 切换面板（船舶、市场、派系、合同、事件……）、设置速度（1×/2×/5×/10×）、产卵船/设施

blocks.html_en: Every panel reads the ECS world live — the inspector is effectively a real-time debugger with full component access. Click a ship to see its credits, crew, fuel, current goal, fitting, route memory, and its last few AI commands.

sentences.en: Every panel reads the ECS world live — the inspector is effectively a real-time debugger with full component access.
sentences.zh: 每个面板都会实时读取 ECS 世界 - 检查器实际上是一个具有完整组件访问权限的实时调试器。

sentences.en: Click a ship to see its credits, crew, fuel, current goal, fitting, route memory, and its last few AI commands.
sentences.zh: 单击一艘船即可查看其积分、船员、燃料、当前目标、装配、航线记忆以及最后的几个 AI 命令。

sentences.en: Architecture
sentences.zh: 建筑学

blocks.html_en: Five crates in one Cargo workspace:

sentences.en: Five crates in one Cargo workspace:
sentences.zh: 一个 Cargo 工作区中有五个板条箱：

sentences.en: Three rules keep it honest:
sentences.zh: 三个规则保持诚实：

blocks.html_en: • sim_core never imports tokio, sqlx, or axum. Pure logic only, so the whole simulation is reasoned about and unit-tested without async.

sentences.en: sim_core never imports tokio, sqlx, or axum.
sentences.zh: sim_core 从不导入 tokio、sqlx 或 axum。

sentences.en: Pure logic only, so the whole simulation is reasoned about and unit-tested without async.
sentences.zh: 仅纯逻辑，因此整个模拟都经过推理和单元测试，无需异步。

blocks.html_en: • hecs is the source of truth during a tick. The tick loop holds exclusive mutable access — no per-agent locks.

sentences.en: hecs is the source of truth during a tick.
sentences.zh: hecs 是tick期间的真相来源。

sentences.en: The tick loop holds exclusive mutable access — no per-agent locks.
sentences.zh: 滴答循环拥有独占的可变访问权——没有每个代理的锁。

blocks.html_en: • Cross-entity effects go through a command buffer (SimCommand). A phase reads world state and writes commands; the next phase applies them. Deterministic, no mid-phase write conflicts.

sentences.en: Cross-entity effects go through a command buffer (SimCommand).
sentences.zh: 跨实体效果通过命令缓冲区 (SimCommand)。

sentences.en: A phase reads world state and writes commands; the next phase applies them.
sentences.zh: 一个阶段读取世界状态并写入命令；下一阶段将应用它们。

sentences.en: Deterministic, no mid-phase write conflicts.
sentences.zh: 确定性，无中间阶段写入冲突。

blocks.html_en: The full tick phase order, ownership model, and feedback loops are diagrammed in docs/ARCHITECTURE.md.

sentences.en: The full tick phase order, ownership model, and feedback loops are diagrammed in docs/ARCHITECTURE.md.
sentences.zh: 完整的报价阶段顺序、所有权模型和反馈循环在 docs/ARCHITECTURE.md 中进行了图表化。

blocks.html_en: The original Godot client lives on in history as a parity reference, but it's no longer the front end — the pivot to an embedded Bevy client removed the socket boundary entirely, and every feature now lands in client_bevy.

sentences.en: The original Godot client lives on in history as a parity reference, but it's no longer the front end — the pivot to an embedded Bevy client removed the socket boundary entirely, and every feature now lands in client_bevy.
sentences.zh: 最初的 Godot 客户端作为奇偶校验参考而存在于历史中，但它不再是前端 - 嵌入式 Bevy 客户端的枢纽完全消除了套接字边界，并且每个功能现在都落在 client_bevy 中。

blocks.html_en: The original Godot client lives on in history as a parity reference, but it's no longer the front end — the pivot to an embedded Bevy client removed the socket boundary entirely, and every feature now lands in client_bevy.

sentences.en: The original Godot client lives on in history as a parity reference, but it's no longer the front end — the pivot to an embedded Bevy client removed the socket boundary entirely, and every feature now lands in client_bevy.
sentences.zh: 最初的 Godot 客户端作为奇偶校验参考而存在于历史中，但它不再是前端 - 嵌入式 Bevy 客户端的枢纽完全消除了套接字边界，并且每个功能现在都落在 client_bevy 中。

sentences.en: Building & packaging
sentences.zh: 建筑与包装

blocks.html_en: The Makefile wraps cargo + rustup + codesign + packaging:

sentences.en: The Makefile wraps cargo + rustup + codesign + packaging:
sentences.zh: Makefile 包装了 Cargo + rustup + codesign + 包装：

blocks.html_en: The workspace version in the root Cargo.toml is the single source of truth — the binary reads it via env!("CARGO_PKG_VERSION") and the Makefile greps the same field for Info.plist and archive names, so packaged builds never drift.

sentences.en: The workspace version in the root Cargo.toml is the single source of truth — the binary reads it via env!("CARGO_PKG_VERSION") and the Makefile greps the same field for Info.plist and archive names, so packaged builds never drift.
sentences.zh: 根 Cargo.toml 中的工作区版本是唯一的事实来源 - 二进制文件通过 env!("CARGO_PKG_VERSION") 读取它，并且 Makefile greps Info.plist 和存档名称的相同字段，因此打包的构建永远不会漂移。

sentences.en: Tech stack
sentences.zh: 技术栈

sentences.en: Rust (edition 2021) — the whole thing
sentences.zh: Rust（2021 版）——全部内容

blocks.html_en: • Bevy 0.18 — renderer, ECS-driven main loop, custom WGSL shaders (procedural planets, sun corona, nebulae, starfield)

sentences.en: Bevy 0.18 — renderer, ECS-driven main loop, custom WGSL shaders (procedural planets, sun corona, nebulae, starfield)
sentences.zh: Bevy 0.18 — 渲染器、ECS 驱动的主循环、自定义 WGSL 着色器（程序行星、日冕、星云、星空）

blocks.html_en: • hecs — the simulation's own ECS (separate from Bevy's, deliberately)

sentences.en: hecs — the simulation's own ECS (separate from Bevy's, deliberately)
sentences.zh: hecs — 模拟自己的 ECS（故意与 Bevy 的分开）

sentences.en: egui (via bevy_egui) — every inspector panel
sentences.zh: egui (via bevy_egui) — 每个检查面板

sentences.en: bevy_hanabi — GPU particle trails and explosions
sentences.zh: bevy_hanabi — GPU 粒子轨迹和爆炸

blocks.html_en: • sqlx + SQLite — persistence, bundled so there's no runtime dependency

sentences.en: sqlx + SQLite — persistence, bundled so there's no runtime dependency
sentences.zh: sqlx + SQLite — 持久性，捆绑，因此没有运行时依赖

sentences.en: axum + tokio — the headless HTTP/WebSocket harness
sentences.zh: axum + tokio — 无头 HTTP/WebSocket 工具

sentences.en: Contributing
sentences.zh: 贡献

blocks.html_en: Contributions are welcome — see CONTRIBUTING.md for dev setup, the conventions that keep the codebase clean, and a list of concrete directions if you want to take this somewhere real.

sentences.en: Contributions are welcome — see CONTRIBUTING.md for dev setup, the conventions that keep the codebase clean, and a list of concrete directions if you want to take this somewhere real.

sentences.en: Built for fun in Rust & Bevy · By Kalcode & Claude · Made with ❤️ in Illinois

content_html_zh:
🚀 太空计划

Rust + Bevy 中的自运行太空经济模拟器。

数百艘自主船舶进行贸易、采矿、运输货物、签订合同、耗尽燃料，甚至在生机勃勃的太阳能经济中偶尔破产——市场自行定价，派系征税和补贴，人口不满时迁移，废弃的车站腐烂。 一切都在一个本机二进制文件中运行，没有运行时依赖性。

这是什么？

Space Project 是一个包含在本机 3D 客户端中的代理驱动的经济模拟。 没有脚本化的故事情节，也没有玩家目标——你是一个观察者（和上帝模式的管理员），看着经济运行。

每艘船都是一个自主代理人，拥有自己的信用、船员、燃料、货舱，以及一个 GOAP 规划者，该规划者决定下一步做什么：追逐利润率最高的贸易路线，接受交付合同，寻找造船厂进行改造，或者在士气崩溃之前停靠并让船员休息。 设施运行生产配方，退化和自我修复，升级，并在破产时被遗弃。 派系征收税收和邮政补贴。 人们消费食物、生产劳动力，并在情绪低落时收拾行李离开。 市场根据短缺紧急程度乘数对所有产品进行定价——任何地方都没有固定价格。

它最初是 Elixir/Phoenix 原型，后来用 Rust 重写，因为 BEAM 调度程序在 Windows 游戏 PC 上表现不佳。 引擎 (sim_core) 是纯粹的、同步的、无 IO 的 Rust； Bevy 客户端将其直接作为库嵌入，因此模拟和渲染器共享相同的 ECS 世界，它们之间的编组为零。

如今的规模：约 485 个活体代理（282 艘飞船·93 个设施·27 个人口·8 个派系·60 个天体），在 125 毫秒的预算内以 p50 ≈ 10–20 毫秒的速度滴答。 该架构旨在推动 100k+ 的发展。

🌌 关于事情进展的注释

没有任何地方，独自存在——这就是重点。 这最初是一个有趣的想法：从头开始的太空经济，实际上是模拟自己，而不是伪造它。 它的发展远远超出了我的预期，主要是在与克劳德配对的深夜会议中。 但我并没有假装这是一款有路线图的游戏，也没有积极推动它走向“可交付”。 我将它放在麻省理工学院下，因为这些骨头确实很好，我宁愿有人用它做点什么，而不是让它放在私人仓库中。 所以：分叉它，删除它，重命名它，在它上面安装一个游戏，撕掉经济引擎并完全在其他地方使用它。 构建我没有构建的东西。 欢迎提出 PR 和问题，我会查看它们，但我不能保证节奏。 如果你想把它带到真实的地方，请参阅 CONTRIBUTING.md — 有一个“你可以采取这个的方向”部分是专门为你编写的。

截图

它模拟什么

系统 会发生什么
船舶人工智能 (GOAP) 前瞻性规划者通过抽象的世界状态对每个目标（贸易、交付、加油、改造、休息、探索）进行评分，然后构建行为树来执行最便宜的计划。 当出现更好的选择时，船舶会在飞行途中重新计划。
经济 每个电台的订单簿市场根据短缺紧急乘数对 13 种商品进行定价。 船舶在交易时在市场之间移动实际供应。
合约 六种——交付、快递、乘客、补贴、供应、机组任务——具有完整的发布→接受→付费生命周期、声誉门控、自动续订和年龄递增付款。
设施 运行生产配方（冶炼、精炼、制造、农业、采矿），随着时间的推移而退化，使用工具自我修复，升级 1-10，从当地市场补货，并在长期损坏时被抛弃。
派系 对会员设施征税，为长期短缺提供补贴合同，为未满足需求的新设施建设提供资金，并保持配对关系。
人口 消耗食物和燃料，生产劳动力，在压力下签订食物和乘客合同，并在情绪崩溃时迁移到更快乐的系统。
Crew 饥饿/疲劳/士气与衍生任务（驾驶、工程、贸易、饮食、休息）、技能进步、工资和士气死亡螺旋守卫的总和。
建造 长期的短缺催生了建筑工地，这些建筑工地将交付的货物从 0 → 1.0 累积起来，然后具体化为一个真正的、持久的设施。
坚持 一切都会刷新到 SQLite； SIM 卡会从它停止的那一刻开始恢复。 每个宇宙的 world_seed 使星云背景和地标在重新启动时保持稳定。
空间细节层次 远方船只的滴答次数较少（随着速率缩放的状态变化），因此框架预算会到达您想要的地方。

对于深入探讨 - 刻度阶段排序、AI 堆栈、经济反馈循环、运行时所有权 - 请参阅 docs/ARCHITECTURE.md，其中包含所有内容的美人鱼图。

快速启动

您需要一个 Rust 工具链（稳定）。 然后：

make run
# equivalent to: cargo run -p client_bevy

这会将 Bevy 应用程序启动到主菜单。 开始打开一个新的宇宙（命名它，或采用默认值）；加载游戏列出了二进制文件目录中的每个保存。 将二进制文件旁边的实时保存为 <universe-name>.db — 默认为 sim.db。

其他切入点：

Goal 命令
窗口客户端（调试） 让跑
发布版本 在 target/release/client_bevy 进行构建 → 二进制文件
无头（无窗口，用于 CI/烟雾测试） 货物运行-p client_bevy -- --headless
验证（构建+测试+clippy，严格） 进行验证
烟雾测试（无头启动，打印 DB 计数） 脚本/smoke.sh [秒]
一个二进制文件，一个进程。 client_bevy 是整个事情——模拟在进程中运行。 无头模式启动 HTTP/WebSocket 服务器（来自 sim_server 库箱）以供脚本和 CI 使用；没有单独的服务器二进制文件可以运行。

控制

Input 行动
左键拖动 轨道相机
右键拖动/WASD Pan
滚动 Zoom
左键单击 选择船舶或设施 → 打开其详细信息面板
右键单击 上下文菜单（检查/跟随/POV/销毁）
Space 暂停/恢复
Esc 关闭顶部面板·清除选择·打开暂停菜单
P 暂停菜单
F12 截屏
顶栏 切换面板（船舶、市场、派系、合同、事件……）、设置速度（1×/2×/5×/10×）、产卵船/设施

每个面板都会实时读取 ECS 世界 - 检查器实际上是一个具有完整组件访问权限的实时调试器。 单击一艘船即可查看其积分、船员、燃料、当前目标、装配、航线记忆以及最后的几个 AI 命令。

建筑学

一个 Cargo 工作区中有五个板条箱：

sim_core     Pure simulation logic — hecs ECS, GOAP planner, economy,
             contracts. No async, no IO, no framework. Trivially testable.
sim_db       SQLite persistence (sqlx) — pool, seeder, ECS loader,
             persistence worker, migrations.
sim_server   Library crate — HTTP/WebSocket handlers + engine apply
             helpers. Drives headless mode; embedded by the client.
sim_protocol WebSocket wire types (headless / CI only).
client_bevy  The binary. Bevy 0.18 + egui. Embeds sim_core as a Bevy
             Resource; the renderer queries the hecs world directly.

三个规则保持诚实：

  1. sim_core 从不导入 tokio、sqlx 或 axum。 仅纯逻辑，因此整个模拟都经过推理和单元测试，无需异步。
  2. hecs 是tick期间的真相来源。 滴答循环拥有独占的可变访问权——没有每个代理的锁。
  3. 跨实体效果通过命令缓冲区 (SimCommand)。 一个阶段读取世界状态并写入命令；下一阶段将应用它们。 确定性，无中间阶段写入冲突。

完整的报价阶段顺序、所有权模型和反馈循环在 docs/ARCHITECTURE.md 中进行了图表化。

最初的 Godot 客户端作为奇偶校验参考而存在于历史中，但它不再是前端 - 嵌入式 Bevy 客户端的枢纽完全消除了套接字边界，并且每个功能现在都落在 client_bevy 中。

建筑与包装

Makefile 包装了 Cargo + rustup + codesign + 包装：

make build              # release binary (host target)
make build-mac          # arm64 macOS  (also: build-mac-intel, build-mac-universal)
make build-win          # Windows MSVC (run on a Windows host)
make build-linux        # Linux        (best on a Linux host)

make package-mac        # .app bundle + ad-hoc codesign + Info.plist
make dmg                # macOS .dmg
make package-win        # Windows .zip
make package-linux      # Linux .tar.gz

根 Cargo.toml 中的工作区版本是唯一的事实来源 - 二进制文件通过 env!("CARGO_PKG_VERSION") 读取它，并且 Makefile greps Info.plist 和存档名称的相同字段，因此打包的构建永远不会漂移。

技术栈

  • Rust（2021 版）——全部内容
  • Bevy 0.18 — 渲染器、ECS 驱动的主循环、自定义 WGSL 着色器（程序行星、日冕、星云、星空）
  • hecs — 模拟自己的 ECS（故意与 Bevy 的分开）
  • egui (via bevy_egui) — 每个检查面板
  • bevy_hanabi — GPU 粒子轨迹和爆炸
  • sqlx + SQLite — 持久性，捆绑，因此没有运行时依赖
  • axum + tokio — 无头 HTTP/WebSocket 工具

贡献

欢迎贡献——请参阅 CONTRIBUTING.md 了解开发设置、保持代码库干净的约定，以及如果您想将其付诸实际的具体方向列表。

任何 PR 之前最快的健全性检查：

make verify   # build + ~250 tests + clippy, strict
